Video.summary: The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered; Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation.
Video.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio

Video.summary: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.
Video.title: Bloomberg Intelligence

Video.summary: Focusing on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.
Video.title: Balance of Power

Video.summary: Carol Massar, David Gura. Bloomberg Television takes you behind the scenes of our award winning magazine "Bloomberg BusinessWeek"; Carol Massar and David Gura talk with the writers who break news on a weekly basis and get a lighter touch from the editor who oversees the Etc. section.
Video.title: Bloomberg Businessweek

Video.summary: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilization; they are finding funding for them.
Video.title: Episode 4

Video.summary: The idea of flying cars has largely remained science fiction, until now; a new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.
Video.title: Episode 5

Video.summary: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon; these efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy; but to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.
Video.title: Episode 8

Video.summary: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.
Video.grandparentTitle: Inside The Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With The West
Video.title: Inside The Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With The West

Image.alt: Inside The Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With The West
Inside The Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With The West
Inside The Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With The West

Video.summary: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
Video.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry

Image.alt: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry

Video.summary: Ji Chaoqun was a young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study; then China’s spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft; instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, Speakeasy.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with USC Annenberg School for Communication and Journalism Dean Willow Bay about her investment in Angel City Football Club and her tenure on NBA Inside Stuff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 13

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck to talk about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly interview Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fueled his rise with the Cowboys.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 11

Video.summary: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Magic Johnson to discuss how he was able to make the transition from being a basketball player to a successful businessman.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 28

Video.summary: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.
Video.title: Episode 2

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with AJ Andrews on baseball's momentum, softball's growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Liquid Death is founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing; speaking to CMO Dan Murphy, about the water company's origin as a sheep in wolf's clothing.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's Chief Brand Officer, has been at the forefront of reintroducing the iconic Barbie to the world; the toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stephan Pretorius, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.
Video.title: Quantum Marketing
